title: LobbyBlocks
description: With LobbyBlocks, you allow players on your server to place self-removed blocks!
body:
![LobbyBlocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b643693105a86ffbc599ca541e9123d677a5a508.jpeg)
Looking for Development Builds? You can download [here](https://github.com/frafol/LobbyBlocks/releases/tag/dev-build).​
# ✨ **LobbyBlocks**

## 🧩 **FEATURES**
### 🧱 **Block Placement System**
Place blocks anywhere in your hub — create **blocked regions** exactly how you want!

### ⚡ **Performance Optimized**
Runs smoothly with **minimal impact** on your server.

### 🎆 **Animations**
Enjoy beautiful block removal animations.
*(requires ProtocolLib/PacketEvents)*.

### ⚙️ **Settings GUI**
Fully configurable through an **intuitive and user-friendly GUI**.

### 🔄 **Auto-Updating**
Always stay up to date with the **latest version automatically**.

---
## 🧭 **COMMANDS**
```
/lobbyblocks pos1/pos2
→ Define the borders of your region.

/lobbyblocks createregion (name)
→ Create block place/deny regions.

/lobbyblocks reload
→ Reload the plugin configuration.
```

---
## 🔐 **PERMISSIONS**
Permissions are fully configurable in the **config.yml** file.

---
## 🆘 **SUPPORT**
🔗 Discord Support: **[https://dsc.gg/futuredevelopment](https://dsc.gg/futuredevelopment)**
